title: OpenAPISchemaS3
description: Open API Schema S3 Connection Config

openAPISchemaS3URL.title: OpenAPI Schema S3 URL
openAPISchemaS3URL.description: S3 URL of the OpenAPI schema file (JSON or YAML). Example: https://bucket-name.s3.amazonaws.com/path/to/openapi_schema.json

awsCredentials.title: AWS Credentials
awsCredentials.description: AWS credentials required to access the S3 file.
